case_title: JOHN MCGARY VS. DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP

docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDMENT MAILED TO DANIEL SHUPP-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/RTS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF JOHN MCGARY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LOUISA MENDOZA, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT DANIEL CHRISTOPHER SHUPP IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SINGER, JR., EDWARD C. SUBSTITUTED FOR SINGER, JR., EDWARD C. AS ATTORNEY FOR
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00, OCTOBER 2021, NOVEMBER 2021 AND DECEMBER 2021 RENTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);SERVICE ALSO FOR SC-103, SC-109 SERVED JUL-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGARY, JOHN DBA REAL ESTATE & INSURANCE SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SHUPP, DANIEL CHRISTOPHER
